title: Tristylium longicarpum

Tristylium longicarpum is further classified in the genus Tristylium, which includes only a few species. The genus Tristylium is native to East Asia. The classification of Tristylium longicarpum reflects its botanical relationships and characteristics within the family Onagraceae.
